I meant of course:

# Running javac:
/usr/local/openjdk6/bin/java -client -Xmx896m -Xms128m
-XX:PermSize=32m -XX:MaxPermSize=160m
-Xbootclasspath/p:/usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/build/bsd-i586/langtools/dist/bootstrap/lib/javac.jar
...
